title: Event Dispatcher & Routing

classes.name: EventDispatcher
methods:
dispatchDataChangeEvent(P partition, T dataCollectionId, ChangeRecordEmitter

): boolean

dispatchSnapshotEvent(P partition, T dataCollectionId, ChangeRecordEmitter

, SnapshotReceiver

): void
dispatchSchemaChangeEvent(P partition, OffsetContext, T dataCollectionId, SchemaChangeEventEmitter): void
dispatchTransactionStartedEvent(P, String transactionId, OffsetContext, Instant): void
inner_classes:
SnapshotReceiver

[public interface extends ChangeRecordEmitter.Receiver

] — adds completeSnapshot()

StreamingChangeRecordReceiver [private final, implements ChangeRecordEmitter.Receiver

] — resolves topicName via topicNamingStrategy.dataChangeTopic, calls queue.enqueue(changeEventCreator.createDataChangeEvent(record)), emits tombstone if DELETE

BufferingSnapshotChangeRecordReceiver [private final, implements SnapshotReceiver

] — single-cell AtomicReference buffer, threaded mode uses synchronized(queue), completeSnapshot() marks last record with SnapshotRecord.LAST

IncrementalSnapshotChangeRecordReceiver [private final, implements SnapshotReceiver

] — resolves topicName via topicNamingStrategy.dataChangeTopic, calls dataListener.onEvent + queue.enqueue

SchemaChangeEventReceiver [private final, implements SchemaChangeEventEmitter.Receiver] — applies schema to historizedSchema, routes to topicNamingStrategy.schemaChangeTopic(), calls enqueueSchemaChangeMessage
BufferedDataChangeEvent [private static final] — holds DataChangeEvent + OffsetContext

classes.name: ChangeEventQueue<T extends Sizeable>
inner_classes: Builder<T extends Sizeable> — fluent builder: pollInterval, maxQueueSize, maxBatchSize, maxQueueSizeInBytes, buffering, queueProvider; build() returns ChangeEventQueue
classes.notes: Back-pressure: doEnqueue blocks on isNotFull when queue.size>=maxQueueSize or bytes>=maxQueueSizeInBytes. Signals isFull when batch or bytes threshold reached so poll() drains. Buffering=single-cell delay for last-event marking.

classes.name: TopicNamingStrategy<I extends DataCollectionId>
inner_interfaces: TopicValueAugment<I,S,R> — augment(I id, S schema, R struct): boolean

classes.name: PostgresEventDispatcher<T extends DataCollectionId>
classes.notes: Connector-specific subclass; adds logical decoding message dispatch

key_relationships: ChangeEventQueue<DataChangeEvent> is the typed usage (T=DataChangeEvent) in EventDispatcher
topic_routing_logic: Data events: topicNamingStrategy.dataChangeTopic(dataCollectionSchema.id()) — used by StreamingChangeRecordReceiver, BufferingSnapshotChangeRecordReceiver, IncrementalSnapshotChangeRecordReceiver
Schema change events: topicNamingStrategy.schemaChangeTopic() — used by SchemaChangeEventReceiver when isSchemaChangesHistoryEnabled()
Transaction events: topicNamingStrategy.transactionTopic() — passed to TransactionMonitor constructor
Filter logic: filter.isIncluded(dataCollectionId) gates data event dispatch; changeRecordEmitter.ignoreRecord() also suppresses
Skip logic: skippedOperations EnumSet<Operation>; neverSkip=true if connector supports op-filtering or set is empty; skips transactionMonitor.dataEvent + streamingReceiver.changeRecord
Schema missing: inconsistentSchemaHandler.handle() returns Optional<DataCollectionSchema>; default is errorOnMissingSchema (throws)
Tombstone: emitTombstonesOnDelete=true → extra record with null value/schema on DELETE
Signal detection: operation==CREATE (or DELETE if INSERT_DELETE watermark) AND isSignalDataCollection → sourceSignalChannel.process(value)
important_notes: EventDispatcher is the single central router for data, schema, transaction, heartbeat, and notification events
ChangeEventQueue provides back-pressure (blocks producer on full queue) and optional single-cell buffering for last-event marking
doPostProcessing applies PostProcessorRegistry processors (key/value mutation) before record creation
Extended headers added via DebeziumHeaderProducer if isExtendedHeadersEnabled()
BufferingSnapshotChangeRecordReceiver uses synchronized(queue) in threaded mode to prevent out-of-order enqueue
SchemaChangeEventReceiver applies DDL to historizedSchema AND conditionally enqueues to Kafka topic
ChangeEventQueue Builder supports custom QueueProvider for instrumentation/alternate implementations
